name: Garden Harvest Chicken Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups chicken breasts without skin, cubed and cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter.
2. Add onion and cook, stirring often until tender.
3. Combine flour, bouillon, thyme, and pepper in a separate bowl.
4. Stir the flour mixture into the onion mixture.
5. Cook, stirring often for 1 minute.
6. Gradually stir in milk; continue cooking and stirring until the mixture thickens.
7. Remove from heat and stir in potatoes, chicken, vegetables, and parsley.
8. Spoon the hot filling into the prepared crust.
9. Cover with the top crust and seal the edges securely.
10. Cut slits into the top crust to allow steam to escape during baking.
11. Bake at 375 degrees for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until the filling begins to bubble and the crust edges are brown.
